title: List Deals Request
description: Request parameters for listing and filtering deals. Use deal_ids for single-deal fetch (get_deal equivalent). Supports pagination and updated_since for sync patterns.

deal_ids.description: Specific deal IDs to fetch. When provided, returns only these deals (e.g. single deal when length 1).

transaction_type.description: Filter by deal type (PMP, PG, AP)

visibility.description: Filter by visibility (e.g. PUBLIC for marketplace shelf)

updated_since.description: Return only deals updated after this timestamp (ISO 8601)
